exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your small business launch forward
items: Create a professional email template for reaching out to potential business partners or collaborators
Schedule initial meetings with 5 potential customers to validate your business idea and gather feedback
Create a communication schedule for regular check-ins with your key business advisors and mentors
Build a customer communication system for handling inquiries, complaints, and feedback
Create a networking plan to connect with 10 other small business owners in your industry or local area
Set up a formal communication protocol with your business partners, investors, or key stakeholders
